heading: Reports to Congress: submission in electronic form
label: 480 Reports to Congress: submission in electronic form
notes: Amendments2002—Subsec. (a). substituted “shall provide to Congress (or” for “shall, upon request by any committee of Congress to which the report is submitted or referred, provide to Congress (or each”.Pub. L. 107–314
amendments: Amendments2002—Subsec. (a). substituted “shall provide to Congress (or” for “shall, upon request by any committee of Congress to which the report is submitted or referred, provide to Congress (or each”.Pub. L. 107–314

children.heading: .—Requirement
children.label: a .—Requirement
children.text: Whenever the Secretary of Defense or any other official of the Department of Defense submits to Congress (or any committee of either House of Congress) a report that the Secretary (or other official) is required by law to submit, the Secretary (or other official) shall provide to Congress (or such committee) a copy of the report in an electronic medium.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to a report submitted in classified form.

children.heading: .—Definition
children.label: c .—Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “report” includes any certification, notification, or other communication in writing.
